meta.name: Philipp
meta.siteDescription: Berlin-based Product Manager combining user-centric discovery and AI-leveraged workflows.

hero.quote: Hi, I'm a Berlin-based Product Manager combining user-centric discovery and AI-leveraged workflows to build products that solve real problems and drive positive change.

work.summary: Led end-to-end product strategy and roadmap for a B2B SaaS platform serving 50k+ users.
work.content:
As Senior PM at Acme, I owned the full product lifecycle from discovery to delivery. I introduced Jobs-to-be-Done frameworks that reduced feature churn by 40% and partnered with engineering to ship AI-assisted workflows that cut operational overhead in half.

Key achievements:
- Launched three major product releases on time and within budget
- Built a discovery process using continuous user interviews and quantitative signals
- Introduced AI-assisted roadmapping tools that improved planning velocity by 30%
- Grew NPS from 34 to 61 over 18 months

work.summary: Drove growth initiatives for a consumer mobile product with 200k+ monthly active users.
work.content:
At Bloom Digital I owned the growth product surface for a consumer mobile app. I worked across acquisition, activation, and retention — running over 60 A/B tests in two years and building a culture of evidence-based decision making.

Key achievements:
- Improved 30-day retention by 22% through onboarding redesign driven by user research
- Built and maintained a self-serve analytics dashboard used daily by C-level stakeholders
- Collaborated with marketing to launch a referral program that drove 15% of new sign-ups
- Mentored two junior PMs through their first product launches

work.summary: Started my PM career at a startup studio — shipping 0-to-1 products across multiple verticals.
work.content:
My first PM role was at a startup studio where I worked on multiple 0-to-1 products simultaneously. I learned to validate fast, kill bad ideas early, and build only what users actually needed.

Key achievements:
- Co-founded two internal products from idea to beta within 6 months each
- Facilitated discovery sprints and design sprints with cross-functional teams
- Built strong relationships with engineering and design leads — shipped features with <5% rollback rate
- Developed deep expertise in Agile, Scrum, and continuous delivery

projects.title: OpenClaw Bot
projects.description: An AI-powered personal assistant built on the OpenClaw platform — automating workflows, managing context, and communicating across Telegram.
projects.summary: A fully autonomous AI assistant that manages my schedule, research, and workflows — running 24/7 on a VPS.
projects.content:
OpenClaw Bot is my personal AI assistant experiment — and one of the most ambitious things I've built without being a professional developer.

The bot runs continuously on a Hetzner VPS and handles:
- **Morning briefings** — curated news, calendar events, and weather delivered to Telegram every morning
- **Research tasks** — automated web research with Tavily, summarized and structured
- **Memory management** — persistent context across sessions using a custom memory system
- **Workflow automation** — scheduling tasks, managing to-dos, and proactive reminders

Building this project taught me an enormous amount about agentic systems, prompt engineering, and the real challenges of running autonomous AI in production.

projects.title: Vibecode Galerie
projects.description: A curated gallery of AI-generated visuals and creative coding experiments — showcasing the intersection of code and aesthetics.
projects.summary: A personal gallery project exploring AI-generated art and creative coding — built with React and deployed on Vercel.
projects.content:
Vibecode Galerie started as a place to collect and display AI-generated images that surprised or delighted me. It grew into a full creative coding project exploring what's possible at the intersection of machine intelligence and visual design.

The gallery features:
- **Curated AI visuals** — generated with various models, selected for aesthetic quality
- **Creative experiments** — interactive pieces built with code and deployed on Vercel
- **A clean, image-first layout** — letting the work speak for itself

Building this project pushed me to understand the full Next.js App Router, image optimization, and responsive design at a deeper level. It's also a reminder that product thinking applies to personal projects too.
